ghostty.toggleTheme.title: Theme: Toggle light/dark
ghostty.toggleTheme.subtitle: Flip Ghostty between TokyoNight Storm and TokyoNight Day

commands.name: Theme: Light
commands.command: sed -i '' 's/^theme = .*/theme = TokyoNight Day/; s/^cursor-color = .*/cursor-color = #2e7de9/' ~/.config/ghostty/config && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "Ghostty" to keystroke "," using {command down, shift down}' >/dev/null 2>&1; printf '\e[2K\r\e[1A\e[2K\r'

commands.name: Theme: Dark
commands.command: sed -i '' 's/^theme = .*/theme = TokyoNight Storm/; s/^cursor-color = .*/cursor-color = #7aa2f7/' ~/.config/ghostty/config && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "Ghostty" to keystroke "," using {command down, shift down}' >/dev/null 2>&1; printf '\e[2K\r\e[1A\e[2K\r'
